notes: Market closed today for Juneteenth — no live trading. VIX 16.8 with a constructive but rate-sensitive tape (Iran-deal optimism vs. Fed-hike worries after a strong jobs report); holding 0.45 into the long weekend ahead of a heavy data slate June 22-26.
journal_entry: Final Juneteenth-closure check — staying flat at 0.45 neutral, no action possible. Tape healthy (VIX 16.8, chips leading) but rate expectations are creeping higher and a busy data week looms. Avoids unchanged: parabolic AMC/BFLY/GPUS, CLOV spec, AAPL extended, AMD/ROKU/SABR soft. Chip names MU/MRVL/SNDK/NBIS still leaders; reassess re-risking Monday on yields and rally follow-through.
